signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Bets Surge with $5M Volume | NO | MED confidence**

Elon Musk Tweet Count Bets Surge with $5M Volume | NO | MED confidence**

Traders on X are buzzing about "Elon Musk # tweets April 14 - April 21, 2026?" where the 260-279 range trades at 24%, part of high-volume tweet markets totaling over $16M, but lacking confirmed whale moves or tips in available results.[4][5]

signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb), below market forecasts of 2.4% amid Middle East energy shocks | NO | HIGH confidence**[1][2][3]  
Bank of Korea held policy rate at 2.5% for 7th straight meeting (Apr 10, 2026), citing oil-driven inflation risks above 2% target despite moderation, with no rate cut signaled**[1][3][4].  
Forecasts project 2.6% by Q
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Iran x Israel/US Conflict Market Dominates X Chatter | NO | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active X-related market assigns 97% odds to the "Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by December 31," reflecting heavy trader conviction amid real-time volume, though no specific X posts on whale bets or mispricing are detailed in current data.[1]
